message:
fix: use telemetry prefix in ULID generation and deduplicate WAL entries

searcher.rs: next_telemetry_identifier now prepends the prefix parameter
to generated ULIDs instead of discarding it with `let _ = prefix`. Tests
updated to parse prefix-separated ULID suffix.

lib.rs: WAL loading deduplicates entries by doc_id (last-write-wins via
reverse iteration) to prevent stale duplicate vectors from persisting
after crash recovery. WAL extend path also deduplicates before appending.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
